app.title: RedSun: System user access on Win 11/10 and Server with the April 2026 Update
app.author: airhangerf15
app.description: A tool for managing system user access on Windows 11/10 and Server with the April 2026 Update.
proposed_tests: Install RedSun and create a new user
Test user access and ensure proper permissions
